caption: An educational presentation on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" is shown, featuring a slide titled "Tutorial – 2". The slide focuses on the "Work/unit mass of gas liquefied" and displays a T-S diagram with a cycle delineated by lines labeled "T=const", "p=const", "S=const", and "h=const". Across the sequence, the slide is incrementally updated with calculations. Initially, only the diagram and heading are visible. The NPTEL logo is visible in the bottom-left corner, and the bottom banner identifies the presenter as "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay".

caption: A series of presentation slides for a course in "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" shows a lesson titled "Tutorial – 2" focusing on "Liquid yield." Each slide features a diagram of a thermodynamic process on a T-s plot, labeled with terms like "T=const," "p=const," and "s=const." Below the plot is a table listing values for pressure (p), temperature (T), enthalpy (h), and entropy (s) at different states. The slides are credited to "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay" and feature a logo in the bottom left. Across the frames, a mathematical calculation for liquid yield, $y = \frac{h_i - h_f}{h_r - h_f}$, is gradually completed. It starts as a formula, then incorporates the values $\frac{462 - 29}{462 - 29}$, transitions to $\frac{462 - 430}{462 - 29} = \frac{32}{433}$, and finally concludes with the result $= 0.074$.

qa.q: What is the course subject shown in the presentation?
What type of thermodynamic diagram appears on each slide?
What is the final calculated value for liquid yield?

caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on the chest, and a gold watch sits in a podcast studio. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. To his right sits a black mug with red and white text that reads "TALK OUT". In the background, a white banner displays the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" alongside gold stars, and a blue sign on the wall reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". As the sequence progresses, the man engages in a conversation, shifting his gaze and using hand gestures to emphasize his points. He initially looks forward, then turns his head and gestures with his right hand, before glancing toward the side and finally settling back into a centered position. A small "BOSS TALK" logo appears in the bottom left corner of the screen.

qa.q: What text is printed on the man's hoodie?
What color is the mug to the man's right?
qa.caption_answer: Black with red and white text
